cases.name: good demo with clear next step

prospect.name: Sara Kapoor
prospect.role: Head of Operations at Northwind Tea Co.

input.statedNeed: Daily ops dashboard that pulls Shopify + Klaviyo + ShipStation into one view for the morning leadership review.
demoed: Live data sync from a sandbox Shopify store with under 30s end-to-end latency
Mobile-friendly read view they can check on phone before the 7am huddle
reactionsAndQuestions: She asked specifically about export to PDF for board materials
She raised concern about how the dashboard handles SKU additions automatically
input.agreedNextStep: Send proposal by end of week; book a 30-minute review call for next Tuesday
